reviews.review_description: I love this simulator because it makes you feel like you’re bringing in a case of whoop-a@@ to the enemy.
I just purchased this game. The controller is so sensitive if I move it just a little the plane really overreacts and suddenly I’m  upside down.  I guess I need more training. Lol
I've played through the tutorial and love it. I like the detail of the cockpit controls.  It makes me a little dizzy if I bank hard but seems fairly realistic.

Cartoony poor flight models low fidelity cockpit and the tackiest  story ever but my kids loves it and finally hook a wire on the boat something he's been trying to do in dcs world to no avail so worth it just to watch him snagging 3 wires but no go if ur looking for a hardcore sim.

it's good all round fun when you think it's on your phone.
Do you know when there's going to be any updates for it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, we're working on a few updates, but our next flight simulator will release in a few months.  Look out for a preview, it'll be awesome

reviews.review_description: It’s a great game but it’s kinda pixelated but other than that it’s a great game
Take your time learn the controls and go thur the Territorials and you will enjoy it more

developer_response.body: Thanks for the comments, updates are in the works!

reviews.review_description: So the game is pretty good stands on its own as a 5 star game but if its updated and further optimized as the devs make it sound even better although most games released in last 5 months were dropped then abandoned so if its a dev i dont know im very sketchy but this game has had more of a effort invested in it that many new releases so i hope the devs add to the game and further tweak it like claimed but its off to a strong start good job if your on the fence give it a GO (no pun intended) There is a visual glitch that does NOT seem to affect free flight or combat mode its only campaign atleast through tutorial and first 3 missions of czmpaign with explosions outts the right eye its pretty wonky im on the oculus go im leaving it 5 giving yall benefit of the doubt please fix cause outside of that its a really solid game that deserves your time i emailed yall about the bug if u see this...talked to the dev im very skeptical with GO devs ATM but i sincerely think he aill fix the vision glitch this is one of the only good games to come to the go in months honestly i suggest you try it...skeptical of the "update" i was told via email almost 6 weeks ago he was fixing a bug thats there from launch hasnt happened so just take "updates coming" with a grain of salt lol its ok for what it is though

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback, and thanks for pointing out the glitch.  We'll work on fixing it as well as more content

reviews.review_description: The graphics were good but I never could get the throttle to work when using Oculus go’s hand controller. After multiple tries, I finally got it to work once.  Very disappointed

developer_response.body: In order to use the throttle you simply press the right or left side of the pad.  We can't recreate the issue you're having.  Perhaps your finger isn't in the correct position?

reviews.review_description:
Hoping the Devs keep working on this.
Feels like a beta version.
For 8.99 had much higher expectations
updated review...after a  few sessions I am  raising my opinion.
Please do more updates to game.

developer_response.body: We're pushing the Oculus Go to its limits while maintaining a 60fps frame rate.  However, we're implementing graphics options so that you can raise and lower the effects as desired.

reviews.review_description:
Im enjoying the game. However it does feel like
 production may have been rushed. Maybe an update will fix the screen lag when something explodes.

Other than that keep up the good work and release an update quick!
My dad had to point  the controller all the way down just for the nose to go down a little bit. When he got to the weapons part it kept saying he crashed into the water when he didn’t.

Great game .You have the real sense of trying to control a fighter jet launching from a carrier for the first time. I suspect this game was developed with real input from pilots. Definitely worth the purchase. You will enjoy

Why cant I install this I looked up this game on my oculus and it didnt exist unless i looked it up on my phone and the download button just said purchased on my phone and I cant find it under not in stalled or librayry in general.
Brilliant game really makes you feel like you're in the cockpit

The game is ok but the game just lacks polish.
The enemy planes fly with their undercarriage out and the their flight dynamics are totally wrong. The graphics are basic but ok. The missions sound great but lacks in dimension. 

I do enjoying playing the game but  could be so much better

reviews.review_title: Just one thing needs to be fixed
reviews.review_description: I love comebat simulations and I was looking for it on Oculus go having Meet that desire I like everything about it except one feature  you have to turn in your head to activate the controls in the meantime you get dis orientated on your flying  I wish they would fix that in the game will be a five-star if they did

developer_response.body: Thanks for the comments, expect updates soon.  The game operates at a constant 60fps in order to reduce nausea, but we're working on a separate mode that reduces sensitivity.

reviews.review_description: Message to the developers fix the controller for the oculus go you state that it works for but it does not fix the controller we spent our money for this game give us what we ordered.
The flight feel is great! Graphics can be better

So the visuals are good, but the “story line” is boring and the control (using Oculus GO) is too sensitive. I know they are trying to replicate the real look and feeling of a jet Fighter, but they should bring it down a little for those who are not as “hardcore.” It took me like 5 times the pass the bomb run! In addition, please add more choices to ur menu (including the stick sensitivity).
